# canthaibinhduong Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-16

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 5.x (strict mode) — backend (GAS) + frontend (React) + React 19, Vite 6, ShadCN UI, Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI (via ShadCN) (002-responsive-rename-history)
- Google Sheets (via GAS SpreadsheetApp) — no schema change (002-responsive-rename-history)

- TypeScript 5.x (strict mode) + @types/google-apps-script, gas-webpack-plugin, @google/clasp v2.x (001-inventory-management)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (strict mode): Follow standard conventions
